scores.notes: Excellent idiomatic implementation with all required features: event.workload, add_layer with combine=True, replan(), self.config access, relation.data[relation.app], HTTP health check with url field, override:replace. However, ops.ConfigError is an invented class — the ops library does not define this exception, so that branch would raise a NameError if triggered. Since _ready_to_configure() guards against it, normal flow is unaffected, but the hallucination is still present.
